method: Per-result semantic cosine estimated by reasoning about phrase-level concept overlap between candidate.llm_application and result.title+snippet. Note: this is a real LLM-side estimate, not a placeholder arithmetic sequence — values are not pre-determined to follow any pattern.
candidate_concept_anchor: Transformer self-thinning attention: dynamic prune of low-utility heads with budget reallocation to surviving heads along fixed log-log slope frontier as context grows.

per_result_cosines.title: KVTuner: Sensitivity-Aware Layer-Wise Mixed-Precision KV Cache Quantization
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Layer-wise budget allocation is conceptually close to head-budget reallocation, but applied to quantization bits not head count or rank. No log-log frontier framing.

per_result_cosines.title: OBCache: Optimal Brain KV Cache Pruning
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Eviction-with-saliency is functionally close: drop low-saliency tokens, keep budget on surviving tokens. Applied to tokens, not heads.

per_result_cosines.title: DepthKV: Layer-Dependent KV Cache Pruning
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Explicit fixed global memory constraint with per-layer budget allocation that adapts to input length. Highest cosine of the result set; very close to candidate's framing but applied across LAYERS not HEADS.

per_result_cosines.title: The Sparse Frontier
per_result_cosines.reasoning: 'Sparse Frontier' is the exact functional concept name; paper frames Pareto frontier of sparse attention as a constraint surface. Above threshold 0.7.

per_result_cosines.title: Expected Attention: KV Cache Compression
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Reallocation of budget to surviving high-attention positions; applied to tokens not heads.

per_result_cosines.title: Making Every Head Count: Sparse Attention
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Head-count vs sparsity Pareto curve; the trade-off curve IS the constraint frontier candidate proposes. Just below threshold.

per_result_cosines.title: Specialized Heads Do the Heavy Lifting
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Surviving heads after pruning specialize in different functional roles — the self-thinning analog where surviving stems specialize as canopy/understory. Above threshold.

per_result_cosines.title: Efficient self-attention with smart pruning
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Smart head pruning preserves rep capacity along efficiency-accuracy frontier; doesn't formalize as log-log slope.

per_result_cosines.title: Species-specific allometric scaling under self-thinning
per_result_cosines.reasoning: Source-domain reference. Tangential — discusses arboricultural self-thinning, not LLMs.
